goal: Implement MCP capability handshake and per-device filtered tool manifest generation.
acceptance_criteria: 1. MCP clients receive per-device and per-permission tool manifests | 2. Unsupported family actions are omitted | 3. Handshake metadata includes protocol and permission mode

goal: Implement structured observation tiers with screen versioning and deterministic observation envelopes.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Observation APIs return screen_version and tier metadata | 2. AX and OCR first ordering is enforced | 3. Observation deltas can be computed between versions

goal: Implement semantic interaction and form tools including run_steps batching and optimistic screen guards.
acceptance_criteria: 1. interact or forms tools execute semantic actions | 2. run_steps batches multiple actions in one RPC | 3. Expected screen version mismatches return structured conflict errors

goal: Implement recipe execution and initial recording pipeline with YAML contract validation.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Recipes can be created and executed with typed inputs | 2. Recording produces replayable recipe artifacts | 3. Run status and outputs are queryable via API

goal: Implement Identity Broker secret references and MCP elicitation-gated secret injection flow.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Secret references resolve via OS keychain backend | 2. Raw secret values are never returned to MCP clients | 3. Secret injections are audited and permission scoped

goal: Implement stream and input split for interactive sessions with low-latency input data channel support.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Streaming path supports media and separate input channel | 2. Input latency telemetry is recorded | 3. Session reconnect path preserves action continuity

goal: Implement cost guardrail policy enforcement with soft and hard caps on lifecycle actions.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cost caps are evaluated before expensive actions | 2. Hard cap violations block requests with explicit errors | 3. Guardrail events are visible in status or audit streams

goal: Implement snapshot and fork workflows across supported families using async status polling endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: 1. snapshot_start and snapshot_status are available | 2. fork from snapshot is supported where family permits | 3. Unsupported family paths return explicit capability errors

goal: Deliver test runner and artifact bundle outputs with JUnit and optional Allure metadata for device runs.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Test runs emit JUnit artifact by default | 2. Artifact manifest includes logs screenshots and diagnostics | 3. Retrieval endpoint exposes run artifacts

goal: Implement evidence and replay persistence for MCP calls with before and after observation linkage.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Each MCP action stores evidence record with version delta | 2. Replay timeline API returns ordered call history | 3. Retention policy can purge expired evidence safely

goal: Implement versioned adapter plugin SPI for external device family and cloud integrations.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Plugin registration and compatibility checks are implemented | 2. Adapter capability declarations feed template and MCP manifests | 3. ABI version mismatch fails with explicit error
